title: Dynamic Trees - The Aether
description: Compatibility Mod between Dynamic trees and The Aether
body:
![Banner](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/975/394/the_aether.png)

[![Discord](https://i.imgur.com/0Prkr13.png)](https://discord.gg/A4FCBS3) [![Forge](https://i.imgur.com/oeSBh9T.png)](https://files.minecraftforge.net)

## Overview
This mod makes The Aether compatible with Dynamic Trees, adding dynamically growing versions of trees added by it, and fully replacing them during world generation.
The trees, their behavior and their generation can be customized and tweaked through the use of Tree Packs.

## Features
### New Trees
- Skyroot Tree
- Golden Oak Tree
- Crystal Tree
- Holiday Tree (During December and January only)
### New Trees with Deep Aether:
- Roseroot
- Blue Roseroot
- Yagroot
- Cruderoot
- Conberry
- Sunroot
### New Trees with Aether Redux:
- Gilded Oak
- Blighted Skyroot
- Blightwillow
- Fieldsproot
- Glacia
- Purple Glacia
### New Trees with Ancient Aether:
- Enchanted Skyroot
- Crystal Skyroot
- Sakura Tree
- Skyroot Pine
- Highsproot
### New Trees with Aether Gravitation:
- Enchanted Tree
- Beladon
- Aerfin
- Blue Aerfin
- Golden Aerfin

### World Gen
- All biomes in the Aether dimension how have dynamic trees generating in them.
This can be customized through Tree-Packs.

## Other addons
Addons for other mods can be found in the [Dynamic Trees](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees) page.
### Suggestions and Requests
To request a new mod for compatibility please do it [Github Discussions](https://github.com/orgs/DynamicTreesTeam/discussions/categories/compatibility-addon-suggestions).

## Requirements
- [Dynamic Trees](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees)
- [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether)
- Optionally, [Deep Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/deep-aether)
- Optionally, [Aether Redux](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-aether-redux)
- Optionally, [Aether Gravitation](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether-gravitation)
- Optionally, [Ancient Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/ancient-aether)

## License, Permission and Modpacks
Permission is hereby granted to use this mod in ANY mod pack or server. Please don't ask for permission to You can use this in any mod pack you'd like! No need to ask.
This mod has an MIT license and its source is public on github.
